headline: Backrooms is a certified blockbuster with a $38 million opening day
summary: Kane Parsons' film 'Backrooms' secured a massive $38 million on its opening day. It's projected to hit $90 million for its opening weekend, obliterating A24's previous record. This debut far exceeds expectations and sets a new benchmark for indie horror.

headline: Welcome to Night Vale host Cecil Baldwin shares his tech pet peeves
summary: Cecil Baldwin, the acclaimed host of 'Welcome to Night Vale,' revealed his personal tech frustrations. Known for his distinctive voice, Baldwin has a diverse background in acting and narration. His podcast is celebrated for its unique blend of macabre and absurd storytelling.

headline: Microsoft is threatening legal action for disclosing exploits
summary: Microsoft faces criticism over its response to public zero-day exploit disclosures. An individual named 'Nightmare Eclipse' is publicly posting proof-of-concept exploit code. Reports indicate Microsoft is considering legal action against those revealing vulnerabilities.

headline: Two of our favorite art TVs are more than 40 percent off this weekend
summary: Woot is offering significant discounts on Samsung's Frame TV and Hisense's CanvasTV this weekend. The 65-inch Hisense CanvasTV is down to $779.99, its lowest price of the year. These popular art-focused televisions are rarely available at such steep discounts.

headline: Everything Coming to Netflix in June 2026
summary: Netflix is set to release a wave of new content in June 2026, featuring a 'wedding season' theme. Fans can expect additions from popular franchises like 'Karate Kid,' 'Riddick,' and 'Rocky.' The month promises diverse viewing options for subscribers.

headline: Rayman Origins Remaster Leak Reveals First Details About Enhanced Edition from Ubisoft
summary: Details for a remastered 'Rayman Origins' appear to have leaked on the Xbox Store. The leak reveals information about an enhanced edition from Ubisoft. Curiously, the leaked listing shows a placeholder price of $2,000.

headline: The Best Deals Today: LEGO R2-D2, Neon Genesis Evangelion Blu-ray, M5 MacBook Air, and More
summary: Today's top deals feature significant discounts on a variety of popular items. Shoppers can find savings on the iconic LEGO R2-D2 set. Other highlights include the 'Neon Genesis Evangelion' Blu-ray and the advanced M5 MacBook Air.

headline: Stop Killing Games Gains Momentum After Bill Passes California State Assembly Vote
summary: The 'Stop Killing Games' movement achieved a major victory as a bill passed the California State Assembly. This legislation aims to protect games from being prematurely taken offline. The vote marks a significant step forward for game preservation advocates.

headline: Why crucial penalty miss was 'cruel blow' for Arsenal standout Gabriel
summary: Arsenal's Gabriel experienced a 'cruel blow' with a crucial penalty miss in the Champions League final. His first penalty for Arsenal resulted in heartbreak for the club. The miss handed Paris St-Germain their second consecutive Champions League title.

headline: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
summary: The US, UK, and Australia are collaborating to develop advanced underwater drone technology. This initiative falls under the Aukus military pact. The drones are designed to enhance naval defense and protect critical undersea cables.

headline: 'No-one feels safe now': Residents of Romanian city hit by drone share fears
summary: Residents of a Romanian city struck by a drone are sharing their profound fears and insecurity. Many have just begun returning to inspect their homes after the early morning attack. The incident has left the community feeling deeply vulnerable and unsafe.

headline: Palace was handed Andrew's controversial envoy emails six years ago
summary: The Royal Household received thousands of Prince Andrew's controversial envoy emails six years ago. These emails, handed over in 2020, contained sensitive information regarding his financial dealings. The disclosure highlights long-standing concerns about the former prince's conduct.
